purpose: Track small, testable native-port increments without committing ROMs, ASM, extracted assets, or generated proprietary data.

commit_allowed: debug tooling that reads local private data
safe screenshots that contain only original project UI
commit_forbidden: generated roster data derived from the game
tile sheet PNGs derived from the game
audio or other extracted original assets
repo_policy.local_data_boundary: Use --root or TECMO_DECOMP_ROOT to point at a private local decompilation workspace. Keep that workspace outside this repository.

current_runtime.game_core: portable C runtime state plus explicit memory arenas
current_runtime.asset_mode: local development read-only scan/export tools; no committed proprietary data
current_runtime.known_status: prototype launcher/menu, roster viewer, play setup, court placeholder

local_desktop_shortcut.arguments: --play, with --root added automatically when a local decomp root is discoverable
local_desktop_shortcut.icon_policy: Generated original project icon only; do not use copied Tecmo, NBA, ROM, or extracted game artwork.

quick_launch_points.description: Starts at the native launcher main menu.
quick_launch_points.expected_screen: Top-level menu with Play Game, Rosters, Quit.

quick_launch_points.description: Renders the launcher menu to a PNG for screenshot QA.
Renders the launcher menu with debug overlay enabled to a safe committed PNG.
Builds the executable, renders every active screenshot test, and validates PNG dimensions.
Scans the private local decomp for first original title/menu screen source candidates without committing source bytes.
Renders the roster browser to a PNG for screenshot QA.
Renders the play setup screen to a PNG for screenshot QA.
First real original-game screen target after CHR/layout mapping.
quick_launch_points.expected_screen: Original title/menu presentation reconstructed from local data.

rules: Overlay must be runtime-only and must not dump proprietary source data.
Overlay values should be derived from native runtime state and local debug counters.
Screenshot tests should include one overlay-on frame once implemented.
Overlay screenshots committed to this repo must avoid roster names and extracted game assets.

assertions: No local decomp path appears on screen
No local decomp path, roster names, ROM data, ASM, or extracted assets appear on screen
A team roster list is visible

rules: No per-frame heap allocations in gameplay update/render paths.
Use transient arena for temporary frame work and reset it deliberately.
Report arena high-water marks once debug overlay is implemented.
Generated source-map reports stay local and ignored under build.
Public docs may list chunk IDs, relative paths, labels, ranges, and unresolved gates only.
Do not commit ASM text, ROM bytes, extracted CHR bytes, generated proprietary data, or screenshots rendered from original assets.

incremental_milestones.title: Clean public tooling repo
incremental_milestones.done_when: Repo builds and contains no ASM, ROM, extracted assets, or generated game data.

incremental_milestones.title: Prototype launcher and roster flow
incremental_milestones.done_when: Native window launches, menu flows to Play Game and Rosters, screenshot tests render.

incremental_milestones.title: Debug overlay and runtime counters
incremental_milestones.done_when: F3 toggles overlay; overlay shows mode, frame, arena use, selected team/player, and watched RAM bytes.

incremental_milestones.title: Automated screenshot test runner
incremental_milestones.done_when: A single command renders all declared screenshot tests and validates dimensions/files.

incremental_milestones.title: Original title/menu render investigation
incremental_milestones.done_when: Local-only tooling identifies CHR/layout sources needed to render the first original menu screen.

incremental_milestones.title: First original-screen renderer
incremental_milestones.done_when: A quick launch renders the first original-game title/menu screen from local private data.

next_engineering_step.title: First original-screen renderer
notes: Use the local source map to implement --render-test-mode original-title.
Start with a static title/menu frame from local private data, then move timing/animation into native runtime state.
Keep any extracted/generated CHR, palette, or script caches local and ignored.
Add only safe screenshots unless the image is a project UI verification screen without original assets.
